name_en: 💕【New】The GG Emblem collection reinterprets the brand's iconic pattern with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a collectible for years to come. This beige and white shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from the new GG monogram fabric. Finished with grey-green leather trim and Gucci embossed logo.
name_cn:
💕【New】The GG Emblem collection reinterprets the brand's iconic pattern with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a collectible for years to come. This beige and white shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from the new GG monogram fabric. Finished with grey-green leather trim and Gucci embossed logo.
Grey-green and grey-green new GG monogram coated fabric
Grey-green leather trim
Webbing taffeta lining
Gucci embossed
Includes D-ring for hanging removable items
Contrasting stitching
Interior: 1 zip pocket, multiple card slots with flat pockets
Adjustable shoulder strap (52cm)
Snap closure
Color: 820688
Dimensions: 20cm (W) x 12.5cm (H) x 5cm (D)
Weight: approx. 323g
Color: Grey-green PVC/Original leather.
Made in Italy
